the local export directory. Asset bytes are downloaded from the
auth service. Datasource credentials are stripped on export.

AdhocQueryInput.title: AdhocQueryInput
AdhocQueryInput.description:
Ad-hoc query payload with validated datasource links.

Narrows `QueryBase.datasources` for client-supplied (input-only)
payloads, so a malformed id/alias is a 422 rather than a 500. The
base keeps the domain type for output/CRUD models built from
persisted entities.

DataSourceDataResponse.title: DataSourceDataResponse
DataSourceDataResponse.description: Response model for /data call of DataSource

DataSourceDataResult.title: DataSourceDataResult
DataSourceDataResult.description: Individual result of a sub query

DataSourceQuery.title: DataSourceQuery
DataSourceQuery.description: Request model for an individual query

DataSourceRequest.title: DataSourceRequest
DataSourceRequest.description: DataSource model for update and create.

DatasourceLinkInput.title: DatasourceLinkInput
DatasourceLinkInput.description:
Client-supplied datasource link with a validated alias.

The alias is interpolated into rendered SQL as a CTE/relation name,
so it is restricted to a plain SQL identifier and cannot smuggle a
SQL fragment. This is the input-only type; the domain
``DataSourceLink`` remains the output/persistence type.
